role: Contains formal rule definitions for architecture and code style to enforce consistency and layering discipline in the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Collectively establishes enforceable guidelines for code structure (layered architecture with six scoped rules) and naming conventions (interface prefixes, test file patterns), ensuring maintainability, readability, and separation of concerns across all layers of the project.

children.role: Architectural governance document defining layering constraints for the ArchSpine project
Define and enforce naming convention rules for the codebase to maintain consistency and readability.
